series_metadata.series_description: Formerly FIS-03 (019-0003). This record series contains contracts between countries and cities, towns, and villages for provision of indigent defense services by the county in municipal ordiance cases. Pursuant to Section 120.33(A)(4), to be reimbursed

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: current contracts in County Reimbursement operating area unless or a county submits a new contract. previously effective or expired contracts in County Reimbursement operating area one year following State Auditor's report on any and all reimbursement payments affected by previous version of contract
